headline: Micron surges 16%+ on blockbuster earnings
detail: Micron's blowout quarter signals strong AI-driven chip demand, which is directly bullish for the semiconductor sector. This is your best near-term catalyst for AVGO and SMH — watch whether the move holds in regular trading. If it does, it's a cleaner exit window for your AVGO trim rather than a reason to add.

headline: JPMorgan: Retail pulling back on margin and options spells trouble for tech
detail: JPMorgan flagged that retail traders are suddenly getting more conservative with margin and options — a meaningful demand signal for high-beta tech names. You are 90% tech on margin, so this dynamic hits your book directly. Less retail fuel means these names need fundamental support to hold levels, which your SELL/TRIM names currently lack.

headline: Wall Street coalescing on a single S&P 500 target
detail: Broad market consensus targets suggest the easy upside may already be priced in at the index level. For concentrated, margin-leveraged tech books like yours, that means the risk-reward skews toward protecting gains and cutting losers rather than swinging for more upside right now.
